metadata.title: EasyClaw - Deploy OpenClaw in under 1 minute
metadata.description: Deploy OpenClaw with EasyClaw in one click. Connect Telegram, choose a model, and go live fast.
metadata.keywords: easyclaw, deploy openclaw, openclaw hosting, telegram bot deployment, ai assistant deployment

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: News, tutorials, and updates about deploying OpenClaw with EasyClaw.

outfit_generator.title: OpenClaw - Create AI Caricatures instantly
outfit_generator.description: Upload photos to generate fun and artistic caricatures with AI-powered tools.
outfit_generator.upload_placeholder: Click or drag to upload (JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP)
outfit_generator.prompt_placeholder: E.g., 'extend background left and right', 'outpaint sky', 'widen canvas for a banner', 'add room around the subject'...

outfit_gallery.description: See the latest images expanded by our tool. Preview before/after and export the result.

outfit_gallery.no_outfits: No expansions yet. Upload an image to start expanding!

hero.title: Create Amazing Caricatures
hero.subtitle: Transform photos into stunning caricatures with OpenClaw's advanced AI model. Supports both text-to-image and image-to-image creation modes.

errors.upload_reference: Image-to-image mode requires uploading reference images

intro.title: OpenClaw Studio

advanced.negative_prompt_placeholder: Describe what should be excluded from the layers.
advanced.auto_caption_language: Automatic caption language if no prompt provided, True for EN, False for ZH

results.subtitle: Layered outputs appear here after decomposition.

hero.title: EasyClaw - One-click OpenClaw Deployment
hero.description: Deploy OpenClaw in under 1 minute. No servers or DevOps. Pick a model, connect a channel, and launch.

selectors.model_title: Choose a default model for your OpenClaw
selectors.channel_title: Choose where OpenClaw should send messages

deploy.sign_in_button: Sign in to deploy with EasyClaw
deploy.sign_in_hint: Sign in to deploy OpenClaw with EasyClaw and connect your channels.
deploy.status_success: Deployment successful! OpenClaw is now running.
deploy.model_substitution_warning: Model substitution detected. Try redeploying or switch to another region/provider.
deploy.hint_suffix: You can add other channels to the same account later.

telegram.how_to_get_token: How to get your bot token?
telegram.step_3_text: Follow the prompts to name your bot and choose a username.
telegram.step_4_text: BotFather will send you a message with your bot token. Copy the entire token (it looks like a long string of numbers and letters).
telegram.step_5_text: Paste the token in the field below and click Save & Connect.
telegram.preview_intro: I can help you create and manage Telegram bots. What would you like to do?
telegram.preview_name_prompt: Alright, a new bot. How are we going to call it? Please choose a name for your bot.

discord.how_to_get_token: How to get your bot token?
discord.step_2_text: Open Bot settings, click Add Bot, and enable Message Content Intent.
discord.step_3_text: Copy the bot token from the Bot page.
discord.step_4_text: Use OAuth URL Generator to invite the bot with bot and applications.commands scopes.
discord.step_5_text: Paste the token in the field below and click Save & Connect.
discord.preview_intro: Discord bot created. Invite it to your server and it will be ready to reply in your channels.
discord.preview_ready: Yes. Send a message in your Discord server and I can reply there.

whatsapp.connect_subtitle: Deploy first, then start WhatsApp login for this pod.
whatsapp.status_waiting_qr: Waiting for the first WhatsApp QR code...
whatsapp.status_qr_ready: WhatsApp QR code ready. Scan it in WhatsApp Linked Devices.
whatsapp.status_idle: Start WhatsApp login to fetch a QR code.
whatsapp.restore_notice: Restored the current or most recent WhatsApp login session. This page does not auto-refresh.
whatsapp.dashboard_subtitle: If the inline QR flow is not enough, open the official Gateway Dashboard through this fallback.
whatsapp.dashboard_restore_notice: Restored the current Gateway Dashboard session. This page does not auto-refresh.
whatsapp.dashboard_status_idle: Start the fallback to issue an official dashboard link.
